title: LetterMod
description: Mod add letters and numbers on blocks
body:
⚠️REQUIRES FABRIC API⚠️

🔠 Letter Blocks & Color Tool
This mod adds blocks with letters and numbers to help you write text and decorate your Minecraft world!

Key Features:

Characters: Includes standard letters (A-Z), Polish letters, and numbers (0-9).

4 Colors. Every block comes in:

⬛ Black

🟥 Red

🟩 Green

🟨 Yellow

Color Tool: A special tool with a custom 3D model! Just right-click any letter block to instantly change its color.

⚠️ ORIGINAL CREATOR: SamikPL
Check out the original mod here: https://modrinth.com/mod/letteronblock
